3198250.name: Bannerfall
3198250.description:
Create your mercenary army

Choose the composition of each battle group yourself. Build small specialized teams or balanced, well-rounded groups of units. Design a battle standard for each squad, combining multiple banners to wield in battle. Each banner grants unique bonuses - some enhance stats, others unlock powerful abilities. Find synergistic combinations that amplify each other or perfectly fit your squad’s role. Assign officers to carry these standards wisely - if they fall, their squads lose the banner’s benefits!

Less micro, more strategy

You command your squads as groups rather than micromanaging individual units, so positioning is key. Flank enemies to reach their fragile backlines, snipe enemy officers to weaken whole squads, or simply overwhelm them in direct combat. Use terrain features and battlefield effects to your advantage, and cast powerful spells to turn the tide in your favor.

Each run is different

With every playthrough, you'll encounter new sets of banners, units, and story choices. Weigh your risks, cover your weaknesses, and choose your path wisely to overcome the challenges ahead to create an unstoppable army!

Fail, and try again!

Fight through randomized encounters and story events, growing stronger with each battle. Should you fall, learn from it, revise your strategy, and try again. The banner only falls until the next soldier picks it up!
3198250.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 波兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
